mechanics.name: Start your engines! / Speed
mechanics.summary: Your speed starts at 1 and ticks up once each of your turns that an opponent loses life, to a max of 4. 40 cards start your engines and 34 have Max speed abilities that turn on (or upgrade) once you hit speed 4 — rewarding a fast, damage-every-turn clock.

mechanics.name: Vehicles + Mounts
mechanics.summary: 41 Vehicles and 14 Mounts. Crew taps creatures to animate Vehicles; Saddle taps creatures (total power N) to power up a Mount for the turn. Both want a wide, expendable board and turn spare bodies into evasive damage.

mechanics.name: Exhaust
mechanics.summary: Exhaust abilities can each be activated only once ever; several payoffs trigger 'whenever you activate an exhaust ability.' A grindy value axis — get one big activation, then reward the click.

mechanics.name: Cycling
mechanics.summary: 28 cards with Cycling (including cycling lands): pay to discard for a card, smoothing draws and feeding graveyard/discard payoffs while never being a dead card.

archetypes.name: Artifact affinity value
archetypes.playstyle: Flood the board with cheap artifacts and Vehicles, then cash them in: affinity spells come down nearly free while per-artifact scalers snowball the count. Removal and card advantage grind the midgame — a high-ceiling engine that needs real artifact density to pay off.

archetypes.name: Max-speed drain
archetypes.playstyle: Flood a wide Zombie board, then turn every dying body into drain once speed hits max. Cheap sacrifice fodder, premium removal, and graveyard recursion out-attrition the removal-light field into a slow bleed-out.

archetypes.name: Speedway go-wide
archetypes.playstyle: Curve out cheap Pilots and Goblins, then crew Vehicles and saddle Mounts to convert spare bodies into evasive damage every turn. Chip in each combat to tick up your speed and cash in the max-speed payoffs before the grind sets in.

archetypes.name: Saddle-up counters
archetypes.playstyle: Chain cheap bodies into saddled Mounts and crewed Vehicles, then snowball +1/+1 counters — Caradora doubles them — and swing with ever-growing, evasive threats. White removal buys the time to out-size the midrange race.

archetypes.name: Artifact drain
archetypes.playstyle: Flood the board with cheap artifacts and Thopter tokens, then convert them into repeated life swings with Pactdoll Terror and Haunt the Network. Grind behind removal, card advantage, and lifelink while the incremental drain closes the game.

archetypes.name: Loot-and-swing discard
archetypes.playstyle: Loot and cycle every turn to pile +1/+1 counters onto Marauding Mako and Scrounging Skyray and fuel Captain Howler's alpha strikes; the card filtering is the engine, so prize discard outlets over raw tempo. Rummage away dead lands and cyclers into pressure while your rares carry the top end.

archetypes.name: Exhaust ramp
archetypes.playstyle: Ramp early with dorks and land-fetch, then dump mana into pricey one-time Exhaust abilities that snowball +1/+1 counters and refill your hand. Reuse Exhausts with Elvish Refueler and close with a Sita Varma counter-transfer swing or an over-the-top bomb.

archetypes.name: Max-speed aggro
archetypes.playstyle: Deploy a cheap aggressive board and chip every turn to sprint to max speed, flipping on double strike, doubled damage, and speed-fueled card draw. Black removal and drain clear blockers so the clock never stalls.

archetypes.name: Graveyard reanimator
archetypes.playstyle: Self-mill and surveil to stock the yard, then reanimate creatures and Vehicles for grindy value and life drain. Lean on efficient black removal to survive into a late game where a single returned bomb closes it out.

archetypes.name: Exhaust midrange
archetypes.playstyle: Curve out with green beaters, then sink Treasure and floated mana into repeatable exhaust activations for +1/+1 counters, haste, and card advantage. Grind a removal-light format with recurring value engines into game-ending bombs.

combos.note: Caradora tutors up Lagorin and adds one to every +1/+1 counter Lagorin's saddled attack hands out
Lagorin's flying saddled attack drops counters on the Mammoth, which also spits out a 3/3 whenever it attacks saddled
Caradora fetches the Mammoth and turbo-charges its counter output
Beastrider's end-step untap frees the creatures you tapped to saddle the Mammoth to block or crew again
Kolodin's enters-saddled/crewed Mounts and Vehicles count for a flood of Coordinator Pilot tokens
The Captain lets the Coordinator's 1/1 Pilots crew and saddle above their weight while anthem-pumping the fleet
A wide Thopter board makes Haunt the Network's artifact-count drain lethal, and it adds two more Thopters
Each Thopter token entering pings the opponent for one and gains you a life through Pactdoll Terror
Every Thopter Fabricator token is another Pactdoll Terror drain trigger
Both scale straight off artifact count, growing huge in a dense artifact deck
One discard both pumps Captain Howler's target and stacks counters on the Mako
The Sloop's attack-step loot feeds a counter onto the Skyray every combat
Swashbuckler's attack loot dumps two cards to spike the Mako with counters
Elvish Refueler resets exhaust abilities so Afterburner Expert can fire its counter pump twice in a turn
Refueler lets Sita Varma exhaust twice, doubling the counters and the team-wide power swing
Every exhaust activation draws a card off Rangers' Refueler while Sita Varma piles on counters
Boom Scholar makes the Boostbuggy's exhaust cheaper, and its Treasure helps pay the rest
Thrillseeker's enter-damage and Far Fortune's attack pings both tick your speed toward max every turn
The Zombie tokens feed Gas Guzzler's max-speed sacrifice drain while both race speed to 4
Dune Drifter reanimates a dead body — the Servo-making Nesting Bot is happy to come back and die again
Boom Scholar makes Afterburner Expert's exhaust cheaper, and firing it returns the Expert from the graveyard for another body
Kolodin turns the Glidecar into a hasty artifact creature the moment it enters
